ddt:Target.Name: DC4_Mam2_xFB_xFD_xFE_xFF_vdiag14_v1.1
ddt:Target.Description:
GETRAG Dual Clutch Transmission Applications: DC4: xFB, xFD, xFEm xFF Author: DCMAP-RTR / UET TA API: ROCTTT09 ------------------------------------------------------------------------ Reference document: DCT250_CMF_DED_DFS_v1.0.2.pdf -----------------------------------------------------------------------
v1.0 - Database creation v1.1 - Data correction, request creation, screens update, DID corrections

Data.Name: Counter for rev gear engagement errors
Mileage counter since last LH occured
Driving cycle counter since last LH occured
Brake sw. Handbrake status.Brake sw. Handbrake status
counter for launches in reverse gear
counter for shift lever in park position with vehicle velocity over threshold
counter for shift lever in reverse position with vehicle velocity over threshold
max value of clutch 1 energy for a single event
max value of clutch 2 energy for a single event
statistic logging for the maximum input shaft speed 1
statistic logging for the maximum input shaft speed 2
maximum actuator position for clutch 1 touch point
maximum actuator position for clutch 2 touch point
minimum actuator position for clutch 1 touch point
minimum actuator position for clutch 2 touch point
Min value of l2 counter Sz001
Min value of l2 counter Sz002
Min value of l2 counter Sz003
Min value of l2 counter Sz004
Min value of l2 counter Sz006a
Min value of l2 counter Sz006b
Min value of l2 counter Sz007
Min value of l2 counter Sz008
Avg value of l2 counter Sz001
Avg value of l2 counter Sz002
Avg value of l2 counter Sz003
Avg value of l2 counter Sz004
Avg value of l2 counter Sz006a
Avg value of l2 counter Sz006b
Avg value of l2 counter Sz007
Avg value of l2 counter Sz008
Engine RPM
Data.Comment: Engine speed received on the CAN from ECM

Data.Name: TRS 1 raw value.Raw Sensor angle value
Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors
Brake sw. Handbrake status.Brake sw. Handbrake switch

Item.Text: Routine Aborted due to an error

Data.Name: Factors for clutch 1 temperature states red
Factors for clutch 2 temperature states red

Item.Text: NO ENG TQ EXP RAW ERR

Data.Name: TRS sensor 1 input signal error state
TRS sensor 2 input signal error state
Buffer.Drum.State.Substate.State from the time before reset
Buffer.Drum.State.Substate.Substate from the time before reset
Encoder value of shiftdrum 1 during last
Encoder value of shiftdrum 2 during last
Buffer.Shiftdrum1.Part6.Remaining shifts till shutoff amplifier stage
Buffer.Shiftdrum1.Part6.Actual gear of current engage activity
Buffer.Shiftdrum2.Part6.Remaining shifts till shutoff amplifier stage
Buffer.Shiftdrum2.Part6.Actual gear of current engage activity
Buffer.Gti.Part5.Error type actuator check during teach in shiftdrum 1
Buffer.Gti.Part5.Error type actuator check during teach in shiftdrum 2
Buffer.Gti.Part5.Error type actuator sensor check shiftdrum 1
Buffer.Gti.Part5.Error type actuator sensor check shiftdrum 2
Buffer.Gti.Part8.Data in nonvolatile RAM is valid
Manual upshift signal from shift lever
Manual downshift signal from shift lever
counter 0 for engage actions with clutching before
counter 1 for engage actions with clutching before
counter 2 for engage actions with clutching before
counter 3 for engage actions with clutching before
counter 4 for engage actions with clutching before
counter 5 for engage actions with clutching before
counter 6 for engage actions with clutching before
encoder value of shiftdrum 1 during last shutdown
lower position of shiftdrum 1 determined by reference drive
upper position of shiftdrum 1 determined by reference drive
encoder value of shiftdrum 2 during last shutdown
lower position of shiftdrum 2 determined by reference drive
upper position of shiftdrum 2 determined by reference drive
emergency request on shiftdrum 1 during last run
emergency request on shiftdrum 2 during last run
last executed reference drive sd2 was faulty
last executed reference drive sd1 was faulty
refpoint drift of shifdrum 2 was detected during last run
input shaft 1 speed error status for error storage
input shaft 2 speed error status for error storage
refpoint drift of shifdrum 1 was detected during last run

Item.Text: MAM or gearbox mech part1 unexpected SD standstill/movement
MAM or gearbox mech part2 unexpected SD standstill/movement
MAM or gb mech part 1 or clu1 sync timeout
MAM or gb mech part 2 or clu2 sync timeout
TCU low power supply over undervoltage
TCU low power supply below first threshold
Manual up down switches invalid voltage
TCU high power supply over undervoltage
TCU high power supply below first threshold
Shift drum 1 endstop position not plausible
Shift drum 1 sync speed rate not plausible
Shift drum 2 sync speed rate not plausible
Shift drum 1 moving direction not plausible
Shift drum 2 moving direction not plausible
Shift drum 1 position out of range
Shift drum 2 position out of range
Clutch actuator 1 hall sensor power supply voltage under 3,72V
Clutch actuator 2 hall sensor power supply voltage under 3,72V
Clutch actuator 1 hall sensor power supply voltage over 5,8V
Clutch actuator 2 hall sensor power supply voltage over 5,8V
Clutch actuator 1 position signal correlation not plausible
Clutch actuator 2 position signal correlation not plausible
Clutch actuator 1 (CCS/dir from ATIC vs.redundant hall signals)
Clutch actuator 2 (CCS/dir from ATIC vs.redundant hall signals)
Shift actuator 1 RPS signal wrong PWM
Shift actuator 2 RPS signal wrong PWM
ATIC shift actuator 1 SCG on half bridge 1,2,3_ low side or high side
ATIC shift actuator 2 SCG on half bridge 1,2,3_ low side or high side
ATIC shift actuator 1 SCB on half bridge 1,2,3_ low side or high side
ATIC shift actuator 2 SCB on half bridge 1,2,3_ low side or high side
ATIC shift actuator 1 OC on h-bridge or on 3rd half bridge_ low side or high side
ATIC shift actuator 2 OC on h-bridge or on 3rd half bridge_ low side or high side
ATIC shift actuator 1 over or undervoltage
ATIC shift actuator 2 over or undervoltage
Shift actuator 1 angle difference too high
Shift actuator 2 angle difference too high
Shift actuator 1 position sensor signal incorrect ATIC vs. RPS
Shift actuator 2 position sensor signal incorrect ATIC vs. RPS
Inputshaft Speed Sensor 1 supply voltage under 4,5V
Inputshaft Speed Sensor 2 supply voltage under 4,5V
Inputshaft Speed Sensor 1 supply voltage over 13V
Inputshaft Speed Sensor 2 supply voltage over 13V
Inputshaft Speed Sensor 1 value not plausible
Inputshaft Speed Sensor 2 value not plausible
Lvl2 restart SZ1 unwanted engine torque increase
Lvl2 restart SZ2 wrong dir launch
Lvl2 restart SZ3 shift r while driving
Lvl2 restart SZ6a downshift not allowed
Circuit Short To Ground Or Open
Circuit Short To Battery Or Open
Signal Rate Of Change Below Threshold
Signal Rate Of Change Above Threshold
Signal Bias Out Of Range / Zero Adjustment Failure
Signal Has Too Few Transitions / Events
Signal Has Too Many Transitions / Events
Alive / Sequence Counter Incorrect / Not Updated
Value Of Signal Protection Calculation Incorrect

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Clutch 1 error.clutch 1 open reference failed repeatedly
Clutch 1 error.clutch 1 close reference failed repeatedly
Clutch 1 error.clutch 1 self open test result active only repeatedly
Clutch 1 error.clutch 1 self open test result blocked repeatedly
Clutch 2 error.clutch 2 open reference failed repeatedly
Clutch 2 error.clutch 2 close reference failed repeatedly
Clutch 2 error.clutch 2 self open test result active only repeatedly
Clutch 2 error.clutch 2 self open test result blocked repeatedly

Request.Name: Read clutch actuator 1 load curve adaptive value in opening direction
Read clutch actuator 1 load curve adaptive value in closing direction
Read clutch 1 max available actuator travel

Request.Name: reference TRS in shiftlever position P.perform routine
clutch touchpoint adaption.perform routine.clutch1.test rig adaption
clutch touchpoint adaption.perform routine.clutch2.test rig adaption
clutch touchpoint adaption.status request.clutch1.test rig adaption
clutch touchpoint adaption.status request.clutch2.test rig adaption
Reset clutch fricition shape coefficients clutch 1
Stop clutch continuous current feed adaption
Stop clutch characteristic curve analysis and adaptation
Stop clutch actuator torque cycle control
Stop clutch actuator simultaneous position control
Stop reference TRS in shiftlever position P
Stop clutch actuator position cycle control
Clutch continuous current feed adaptation.perform routine.clutch 1
Clutch continuous current feed adaptation.perform routine.clutch 2
Clutch characteritics curve analysis and adaptation.perform routine.clutch 1
Clutch characteritics curve analysis and adaptation.perform routine.clutch 2
Clutch characteritics curve analysis and adaptation.status.clutch 1
Clutch characteritics curve analysis and adaptation.status.clutch 2
Clutch actuator position cycle control.perform routine.clutch 1
Clutch actuator position cycle control.perform routine.clutch 2
Clutch acuator simultaneous position control.perform routine
Clutch actuator voltage cycle control.perform routine.clutch 1
Clutch actuator voltage cycle control.perform routine.clutch 2
reference TRS in shiftlever position P.status
Reset clutch fricition shape coefficients clutch 2
Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction.clutch 1
Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction.clutch 2
Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction.clutch 1
Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction.clutch 2
Set clutch adaptation control flag.adaptation allowed
Set clutch adaptation control flag.adaptation not allowed
Copy Modify max available actuator travel.clutch 2

Request.Name: Stop clutch actuator voltage cycle control
ClearFailures
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Device.Name: ATIC shift actuator 1 OC on h-bridge or on 3rd half bridge_ low side or high side

Display.DataName: Mileage counter since last LH occured
Driving cycle counter since last LH occured
Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors
TRS 1 raw value.Raw Sensor angle value
Brake sw. Handbrake status.Brake sw. Handbrake status
Mileage counter since last LH occured
Driving cycle counter since last LH occured
Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors
TRS 1 raw value.Raw Sensor angle value
Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)
Status request TRS shift lever teach in

Button.Text: Perform TRS shift lever teach in

Send.RequestName: reference TRS in shiftlever position P.perform routine

Display.RequestName: reference TRS in shiftlever position P.status

Label.Text: Status request shift drum teach in
Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running | Brake pedal PRESSED
In case the shiftdrum positions are negative the teach-in is not done correctly
Wait 10 seconds until the routine finishes execution

Button.Text: Perform shift drum teach in

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Battery voltage >9V | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
Repeat the procedure with a powerlatch in case the confidence level is not High

Button.Text: Perform touch point adaptation

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Battery voltage >9V | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
Repeat the procedure with a powerlatch in case the confidence level is not High

Button.Text: Perform touch point adaptation

Screen.Name: Step 1. Reset all relevant clutch data

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)

Button.Text: Reset clutch friction shape coefficients clutch 1 (step 1.01)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch fricition shape coefficients clutch 1
Reset clutch fricition shape coefficients clutch 1

Button.Text: Reset clutch friction shape coefficients clutch 2 (step 1.02)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch fricition shape coefficients clutch 2
Reset clutch fricition shape coefficients clutch 2

Button.Text: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction for clutch 1 (step 1.03)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction.clutch 1
Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction.clutch 1

Button.Text: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction for clutch 2 (step 1.04)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction.clutch 2
Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction.clutch 2

Button.Text: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction for clutch 1 (step 1.05)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction.clutch 1
Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction.clutch 1

Button.Text: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction for clutch 2 (step 1.06)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction.clutch 2
Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction.clutch 2

Button.Text: Modify clutch position hysteresis compensation for clutch 1 (step 1.07)
Modify clutch position hysteresis compensation for clutch 2 (step 1.08)
Modify clutch torque hysteresis compensation for clutch 1 (step 1.09)
Modify clutch torque hysteresis compensation for clutch 2 (step 1.10)
Modify clutch friction general coeficient for clutch 1 (step 1.11)
Modify clutch friction general coeficient for clutch 2 (step 1.12)
Reset EOL completion status for clutch 1 (step 1.13)
Reset EOL completion status for clutch 2 (step 1.14)

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)

Button.Text: Perform reference clutch 1

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)

Button.Text: Perform reference clutch 2

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)

Button.Text: Perform clutch 1 travel test
Engage N on input shafts

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)

Button.Text: Perform clutch 2 travel test
Engage N on input shafts

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Battery voltage >9V | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
Repeat the procedure with a powerlatch in case the confidence level is not High

Button.Text: Perform touch point adaptation

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Battery voltage >9V | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
Repeat the procedure with a powerlatch in case the confidence level is not High

Button.Text: Perform touch point adaptation

Screen.Name: Step 1. Reset all relevant clutch data

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)

Button.Text: Reset clutch friction shape coefficients clutch 1 (step 1.01)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch fricition shape coefficients clutch 1
Reset clutch fricition shape coefficients clutch 1

Button.Text: Reset clutch friction shape coefficients clutch 2 (step 1.02)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch fricition shape coefficients clutch 2
Reset clutch fricition shape coefficients clutch 2

Button.Text: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction for clutch 1 (step 1.03)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction.clutch 1
Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction.clutch 1

Button.Text: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction for clutch 2 (step 1.04)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction.clutch 2
Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction.clutch 2

Button.Text: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction for clutch 1 (step 1.05)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction.clutch 1
Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction.clutch 1

Button.Text: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction for clutch 2 (step 1.06)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction.clutch 2
Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction.clutch 2

Button.Text: Modify clutch position hysteresis compensation for clutch 1 (step 1.07)
Modify clutch position hysteresis compensation for clutch 2 (step 1.08)
Modify clutch torque hysteresis compensation for clutch 1 (step 1.09)
Modify clutch torque hysteresis compensation for clutch 2 (step 1.10)
Modify clutch friction general coeficient for clutch 1 (step 1.11)
Modify clutch friction general coeficient for clutch 2 (step 1.12)
Reset EOL completion status for clutch 1 (step 1.13)
Reset EOL completion status for clutch 2 (step 1.14)

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)

Button.Text: Perform reference clutch 1

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)

Button.Text: Perform reference clutch 2

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)

Button.Text: Perform clutch 1 travel test
Engage N on input shafts

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)

Button.Text: Perform clutch 2 travel test
Engage N on input shafts

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Battery voltage >9V | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
Repeat the procedure with a powerlatch in case the confidence level is not High

Button.Text: Perform touch point adaptation

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Battery voltage >9V | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
Repeat the procedure with a powerlatch in case the confidence level is not High

Button.Text: Perform touch point adaptation

Screen.Name: Step 5. Clutch torque capacity recovery process

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Brake pedal PRESSED

Button.Text: Set clutch 1 green flag
Set clutch 2 green flag

Screen.Name: Step 6.1. Clutch 1 actuator position cycle control test

Label.Text: Clutch 1 actuator position cycle control test
Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)

Button.Text: Clutch actuator 1 position cycle control test

Send.RequestName: Clutch actuator position cycle control.perform routine.clutch 1

Screen.Name: Step 6.2. Clutch 2 actuator position cycle control test

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)
Clutch 2 actuator position cycle control test

Button.Text: Clutch actuator 2 position cycle control test

Send.RequestName: Clutch actuator position cycle control.perform routine.clutch 2

Label.Text: Service NOT executed during current ignition cycle
Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)

Button.Text: Perform clutch assembly
Engage N on input shafts

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Engine running | Brake pedal PRESSED
Press the brake pedal and accelerator pedal till kick down at the same time and wait until the routine is completed

Button.Text: Engage N on input shafts
Perform initial clutch 1 adjustment
Status of initial clutch 1 adjustment

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Engine running | Brake pedal PRESSED
Press the brake pedal and accelerator pedal till kick down at the same time and wait until the routine is completed

Button.Text: Engage N on input shafts
Perform initial clutch 2 adjustment
Status of initial clutch 2 adjustment
